market.summary: KOSPI gains momentum on ceasefire hopes; Goldman Sachs upgrades year-end target to 7,000. Gov creates emergency economic teams to mitigate geopolitical volatility.

art.summary: Asian contemporary art shows resilience at Art Basel Hong Kong; 20!2026 Art Seoul platform promotes transparency; luxury sector remains strong.

corporate.alert: Heightened market volatility; government monitoring stock bets as sidecar triggers reach record levels.
